info.title: Customer Support API
info.description: Programmatic access to the Oxide customer support API.

post.summary: Update the permissions assigned to a given user

put.summary: Set the contact email for a user

post.summary: Add a user to a group

delete.summary: Remove a user from a group

post.summary: Link an existing login provider to this user

get.summary: List api keys for a user

post.summary: Create a new api key for a user

get.summary: View details of an api key for a user

delete.summary: Revoke an api key for a user

post.summary: Create a new link token for linking this provider to a different api user
Exchange a magic link access code for an access token
Send a new magic link authentication link

get.summary: Generate the remote provider login url and redirect the user

parameters.name: code_challenge
parameters.description: PKCE code challenge (RFC 7636). Required for all authorization code flows.

parameters.name: code_challenge_method
parameters.description: PKCE code challenge method. Must be "S256".

get.summary: Handle return calls from a remote OAuth provider

post.summary: Exchange an authorization code for an access token

get.summary: Retrieve the metadata about an OAuth provider for limited input flow

post.summary: Exchange an OAuth device code request for an access token

get.summary: Retrieve the metadata about an OAuth provider for public PKCE authorization code flow

post.summary: Create a new Magic Link Client
Add a Magic Link client redirect uri

delete.summary: Delete a Magic Link client redirect uri

post.summary: Add a Magic Link client secret

delete.summary: Delete a Magic Link client secret

parameters.name: include_depleted
parameters.description: Include depleted mappers in the returned results

post.summary: Add an OAuth client redirect uri

delete.summary: Delete an OAuth client redirect uri

get.summary: View details for the calling user

pkce_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier (RFC 7636). Required for all authorization code exchanges.
